title: Mahabharata: Bhishma on the Bed of Arrows
description: The dying Bhishma, pierced by a thousand arrows, delivers his final teachings on dharma, governance, and death.
introduction: The dying Bhishma, pierced by a thousand arrows, delivers his final teachings on dharma, governance, and death.

translation.original_text: dharmam ārambhataḥ kṛtsnam atra te kathayāmy aham
translation.text: I shall teach you the whole of dharma, as I lie here.
